response.original_title: I Mesmerized My Boss & Cuckolded His Hot Wife
response.overview: So me and my best buddy Vinny work in an office crunching data for some asshole we hate. Did I mention that his Smokin Hot wife with huge knockers also works there. She is such a bitch but I would do anything to bang her. Well Me and Vinny went down to China Town the other night and ran into the old man who was selling Classified High Tech Micro Chips that can control people. Well we decided to buy two of them because they were buy one get the second one half price. Well guess what? They worked like a champ and we turned our Asshole Boss and his Smokin Hot wife into Mindless Robots. The micro chips had a special feature that could take any layer of clothes off the subject with the touch of a remote button. After we humiliated them and made them do silly things, I decided to fuck My boss's hot wife while he watched me. It was the best day of work I've ever had.
response.title: I Mesmerized My Boss & Cuckolded His Hot Wife
